ddls:
CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "block_number" INTEGER /* The block number in which the transaction resides */,
  "current_index" INTEGER /* Current index of the transaction within the block */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the transaction was recorded */,
  "tick_cumulative" TEXT /* Cumulative ticks up to this transaction */,
  "liquidity_cumulative" TEXT /* Cumulative liquidity metrics up to this transaction */,
  "initialized" INTEGER /* Indicates if the transaction data has been initialized */,
  "transaction_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of transaction */,
  "from_address" TEXT /* The address from which the transaction originates */,
  "to_address" TEXT /* The address to which the transaction is sent */,
  "amount" TEXT /* The amount of the transaction */,
  "fee" TEXT /* The transaction fee */,
  "status" TEXT /* The status of the transaction (e.g., 'confirmed', 'pending', 'failed') */,
  "network" TEXT /* The blockchain network on which the transaction occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_transaction_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_type_id") REFERENCES transaction_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_block_number FOREIGN KEY ("block_number") REFERENCES blocks ("block_number")
)

CREATE TABLE "liquidity_metrics" (
  "liquidity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each liquidity metric entry */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the corresponding transaction ID */,
  "seconds_liquidity_cumulative" TEXT /* Cumulative liquidity in seconds for this transaction */,
  "consult_cumulative_1800_0" TEXT /* Cumulative consultation metric for the first time frame */,
  "consult_cumulative_1800_1" TEXT /* Cumulative consultation metric for the second time frame */,
  "liquidity_provider" TEXT /* The address of the liquidity provider */,
  "token0" TEXT /* The symbol of the first token in the liquidity pool */,
  "token1" TEXT /* The symbol of the second token in the liquidity pool */,
  "liquidity_rate" REAL /* The current liquidity rate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("liquidity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_liquidity_metrics_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_indexes" (
  "index_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction index entry */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the corresponding transaction ID */,
  "consult_weight_1800_0" TEXT /* Weight of the consultation metric for the first time frame */,
  "consult_weight_1800_1" TEXT /* Weight of the consultation metric for the second time frame */,
  "index_type" TEXT /* The type of index (e.g., 'price', 'volume') */,
  "index_value" TEXT /* The value of the index */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("index_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_indexes_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "blocks" (
  "block_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each block */,
  "block_number" INTEGER /* The block number in the blockchain */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the block was created */,
  "block_size" INTEGER /* The size of the block in bytes */,
  "block_hash" TEXT /* The hash of the block */,
  "previous_block_hash" TEXT /* The hash of the previous block */,
  "miner_address" TEXT /* The address of the miner who mined the block */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("block_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* The first name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* The last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* The phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* The timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the alert */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the transaction ID associated with the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., liquidity drop, transaction threshold) */,
  "trigger_condition" TEXT /* Condition that triggers the alert */,
  "alert_name" TEXT /* The name of the alert */,
  "alert_severity" TEXT /* The severity level of the alert (e.g., 'low', 'medium', 'high') */,
  "alert_description" TEXT /* A description of the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action performed */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action was performed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* The IP address from which the action was performed */,
  "location" TEXT /* The location from which the action was performed */,
  "action_description" TEXT /* A detailed description of the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert history entry */,
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the triggered alert */,
  "triggered_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the alert was triggered */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the alert (e.g., 'active', 'resolved') */,
  "resolved_by" INTEGER /* The user ID who resolved the alert */,
  "resolution_time" TEXT /* The timestamp when the alert was resolved */,
  "resolution_notes" TEXT /* Notes on how the alert was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_history_alert_id FOREIGN KEY ("alert_id") REFERENCES alerts ("alert_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the transaction type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the transaction type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric entry */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the corresponding transaction ID */,
  "processing_time" REAL /* Average processing time for the transaction in seconds */,
  "success_rate" REAL /* Success rate of the transaction as a percentage */,
  "retries" INTEGER /* The number of retries for the transaction */,
  "error_code" TEXT /* The error code if the transaction failed */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* The error message if the transaction failed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id")
)
